title: Payment Gateway Integration
acceptance_criteria: Payment must process Visa/MC/Amex within 3s. Failed transactions must display user-friendly error codes. PCI-DSS checklist signed off before UAT.
solution_approach: Integrate Stripe SDK. Add webhook handler for charge.succeeded and payment_intent.payment_failed events. Store last-4 and card type only.

title: User Authentication via SSO
acceptance_criteria: SSO login via SAML 2.0 must work with Okta and Azure AD. Fallback to local credentials when IdP is unreachable. Session must expire after 8 h of inactivity.
solution_approach: Configure passport-saml. Add /auth/saml/callback route. Map IdP groups to app roles in the user_roles table.

title: Export Reports to PDF
acceptance_criteria: Exported PDF must match on-screen table layout. File name must be report_YYYYMMDD.pdf. Generation must complete within 5 s for up to 500 rows.
solution_approach: Use puppeteer headless render. Stream directly to response to avoid disk I/O. Add Content-Disposition header.

title: Dashboard Performance Optimisation
acceptance_criteria: Initial load under 2 s on a 10 k-record dataset. No layout shift after data loads. Charts must render within 500 ms of data arrival.
solution_approach: Add DB indexes on created_at and owner_id. Switch to server-side pagination. Virtualise chart data points above 1 000.

title: Email Notification Templates
acceptance_criteria: Welcome, password-reset and digest emails must render correctly in Gmail, Outlook and Apple Mail. Unsubscribe link must be present in every email.
solution_approach: Use React Email + Resend. Store template versions in email_templates table. Preview endpoint at /admin/email-preview/:id.

title: Bulk Data Import Validation
acceptance_criteria: CSV up to 50 MB must import within 30 s. Duplicate rows (same external_id) must be skipped with a count shown to the user. Malformed rows must be reported per line number.
solution_approach: Stream-parse with Papa Parse in a Web Worker. Validate each row against Zod schema. Write valid rows in batches of 500.

title: Password Reset Flow
acceptance_criteria: Reset link must expire after 15 minutes. Used links must be invalidated immediately. User must receive confirmation email after successful reset.
solution_approach: Generate signed JWT with 15-min TTL. Store token hash in password_resets table. Invalidate on first use via DB transaction.

title: Audit Trail Logging
acceptance_criteria: Every create/update/delete on core entities must be logged with actor ID, timestamp, old value and new value. Logs must be immutable once written.
solution_approach: Postgres trigger on user_stories, tasks and releases tables writing to audit_log. RLS: SELECT only, no UPDATE/DELETE.

title: Mobile-Responsive Checkout
acceptance_criteria: Checkout flow must be fully usable on 375 px viewport. Touch targets minimum 44 px. No horizontal scroll at any step.
solution_approach: Refactor checkout stepper to use CSS Grid with auto-fill columns. Replace hover-only interactions with focus-visible equivalents.

title: Session Timeout Warning
acceptance_criteria: A modal warning must appear 2 minutes before session expiry. User can extend or log out. Warning must not appear if user is actively typing.
solution_approach: Track last activity timestamp in memory. useIdleTimer hook fires at T-2 min. Extend calls /api/session/refresh silently.

title: Role-Based Access Control
acceptance_criteria: Admin can assign roles: Viewer / Editor / Manager / Admin. Permissions must be enforced server-side. UI must hide actions the current role cannot perform.
solution_approach: Roles stored in user_roles table. Middleware reads role from JWT claim. Frontend usePermission hook gates component renders.

title: API Rate Limiting
acceptance_criteria: Public API endpoints must be limited to 100 req/min per API key. Exceeded requests must return 429 with Retry-After header. Limits must reset on a rolling window.
solution_approach: Redis-backed sliding window counter keyed by api_key. Middleware reads X-Api-Key header. Limit config in app_settings table.
